# mrbsizeR

## Installation

The preferred way to install mrbsizeR from CRAN is:

``` r
install.packages("mrbsizeR")
```

You can install the mrbsizeR devel version from github with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("romanflury/mrbsizeR")
```

## Example

``` r
# Artificial sample data
set.seed(987)
sampleData <- matrix(stats::rnorm(100), nrow = 10)
sampleData[4:6, 6:8] <- sampleData[4:6, 6:8] + 5

# Generate samples from multivariate t-distribution
tSamp <- rmvtDCT(object = sampleData, lambda = 0.2, sigma = 6, nu0 = 15,
                  ns = 1000)
 
# mrbsizeRgrid analysis
mrbOut <- mrbsizeRgrid(posteriorFile = tSamp$sample, mm = 10, nn = 10,
                       lambdaSmoother = c(1, 1000), prob = 0.95)

# Posterior mean of the differences of smooths
plot(x = mrbOut$smMean, turn_out = TRUE)

# Credibility analysis using simultaneous credible intervals
plot(x = mrbOut$ciout, turn_out = TRUE) 
```

[![CRAN_Status_Badge](http://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/mrbsizeR)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=mrbsizeR)
[![](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/mrbsizeR)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=mrbsizeR)

# Package index

## Exported Functions

- [`CImap()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/CImap.md)
  : Computation of simultaneous credible intervals.
- [`HPWmap()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/HPWmap.md)
  : Computation of pointwise and highest pointwise probabilities.
- [`MinLambda()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/MinLambda.md)
  : Numerical optimization for finding appropriate smoothing levels.
- [`TaperingPlot()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/TaperingPlot.md)
  : Plot of tapering functions.
- [`dctMatrix()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/dctMatrix.md)
  : Create a n-by-n discrete cosine transform matrix.
- [`dftMatrix()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/dftMatrix.md)
  : Create a n-by-n discrete Fourier transform matrix.
- [`eigenLaplace()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/eigenLaplace.md)
  : Generate eigenvalues of discrete Laplace matrix.
- [`eigenQsphere()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/eigenQsphere.md)
  : Generate eigenvalues of precision matrix Q on the surface of a
  sphere.
- [`fftshift()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/fftshift.md)
  : Swap the quadrants or halves of a 2d matrix.
- [`ifftshift()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/ifftshift.md)
  : Inverse FFT shift of a 2d matrix.
- [`mrbsizeRgrid()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/mrbsizeRgrid.md)
  : Multiresolution analysis of random signals.
- [`mrbsizeRsphere()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/mrbsizeRsphere.md)
  : Multiresolution analysis of random signals for spherical data.
- [`rmvtDCT()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/rmvtDCT.md)
  : Sampling from marginal posterior multivariate t-distribution.
- [`tridiag()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/tridiag.md)
  : Generate a tridiagonal matrix.
- [`turnmat()`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/turnmat.md)
  : Turn matrix 90 degrees counter-clockwise.

## S3 Methods

- [`plot(`*`<CImapGrid>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.CImapGrid.md)
  : Plot of simultaneous credible intervals.
- [`plot(`*`<CImapSphere>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.CImapSphere.md)
  : Plotting of simultaneous credible intervals on a sphere.
- [`plot(`*`<HPWmapGrid>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.HPWmapGrid.md)
  : Plotting of pointwise and highest pointwise probabilities.
- [`plot(`*`<HPWmapSphere>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.HPWmapSphere.md)
  : Plotting of pointwise and highest pointwise probabilities on a
  sphere.
- [`plot(`*`<minLambda>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.minLambda.md)
  : Plot of objective function for finding appropriate smoothing
  parameters.
- [`plot(`*`<smMeanGrid>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.smMeanGrid.md)
  : Plotting of scale-dependent features.
- [`plot(`*`<smMeanSphere>`*`)`](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/reference/plot.smMeanSphere.md)
  : Plotting of scale-dependent features on a sphere.

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [\`mrbsizeR\`: Scale space multiresolution analysis in
  R](https://romanflury.github.io/mrbsizeR/articles/mrbsizeR.md):
